goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to include internet' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the 'north'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'price range', 'postcode', and 'hotel type'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'stevenage' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should 'leave after 14:30' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to include internet and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the north
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Make sure you get price range, postcode, and hotel type
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to stevenage and should leave on sunday
The train should leave after 14:30 and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get arrival time and travel time
